race.comment: PENPEL (7) is a talented filly who lived up to expectations first-up when winning at Canterbury. Thrown in the deep when slow into stride from the low draw to finish twelfth to Plaintiff over 1200m at Randwick in the G3 P J Bell. Will stalk the good speed with the 3kg claim and prove hard to hold out. PROBABILITY THEORY (3) progressive filly starting to build a strong winning CV. Asserted her class first-up with a gritty win over 1200m at Gosford. Undefeated over this trip and gets the right run again. COMMON GOAL (5) going nicely through the grades and he looks up to this tougher contest. Returned good figures when taken to the front for a soft victory over this trip at Kembla Grange. Has further upside with the key jockey change. JAEGERS (6) had a throw at the stumps third-up when outclassed to finish fifteenth over 1200m at Randwick in the G3 P J Bell. No surprise to see her return to form quickly in her right grade.
